---
title: "georgiou_et_al_2024_reanalysis"
author: "MR"
date: "2026-04-25"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
```

```{r Nocturnal activity}
# Load the data
df <- read_csv("georgiou_et_al_2024_data.csv")

# approximate fish counts per colony
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    N = ifelse(treatment == "control", 11.29, 18),
    outside = prop_fish_outside * N,
    inside = N - outside
  )


# aggregate across colonies per night
df_sum <- df %>%
  group_by(night, treatment) %>%
  summarise(
    outside = sum(outside),
    inside = sum(inside),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


# compute log odds ratios with metafor
library(metafor)

df_wide <- tidyr::pivot_wider(
  df_sum,
  names_from = treatment,
  values_from = c(outside, inside)
)

es <- escalc(
  measure = "OR",
  ai = outside_ALAN,
  bi = inside_ALAN,
  ci = outside_control,
  di = inside_control,
  data = df_wide,
  add = 0.5,
  to = "only0"
)


```
